_note: HMRC Self Assessment late-filing and late-payment penalty rules. VERIFY against HMRC before relying on them; interest rates change with the Bank of England base rate. These are editable so they can be kept current.

late_filing.initial_note: £100 fixed penalty as soon as the return is late, even if no tax is owed.
late_filing.daily_note: £10 per day after 3 months late, up to 90 days (max £900).
late_filing.later_note: At 6 and 12 months, the higher of 5% of the tax due or £300 applies at each milestone.

late_payment.note: 5% of the unpaid tax at 30 days, again at 6 months, and again at 12 months late.
late_payment.interest_note: Interest also accrues on late tax (roughly Bank of England base rate plus 2.5%). VERIFY the current rate.
